data.name: Sex Industry XXX
data.detailed_description:
Meet John Valliati, an aspiring adult film director determined to make it big in the industry. The journey begins with humble resources, a dream and a lot of work to be done - the path to the top is filled with challenges. From creating stunning scenes to managing demanding actors and troubleshooting on-set chaos, every decision you make shapes your career.

Build your empire by upgrading your equipment, unlocking exotic locations, and mastering creative techniques. Keep your cast happy, solve unexpected problems, and dive into mini-games that test your skills in managing a fast-paced production.

As your reputation grows, so do the opportunities – but so do the challenges. Will you rise to the top and dominate the industry, or fold under the pressure? With interactive gameplay, resource management, and adult-themed rewards, Sex Industry XXX is the perfect blend of engaging seduction.

Help John on his way and make him reach his goals all while enjoying the undeniably pleasant work atmosphere - will you conquer the industry and become the king of adult entertainment? The spotlight is waiting – dive into the game and take control! 🎥✨

Features:

  • Steamy Adult Content 🔞 – Create high-quality, customizable scenes with immersive settings and dynamic angles.
  • Strategic Gameplay 🎬 – Hire and manage your actors, balance budgets, and grow your brand.
  • Engaging Mini-Games 🎮 – Fix technical issues, handle actors’ demands, and ensure every shoot goes smoothly.
  • Resource Management 💼 – Upgrade your studio, unlock new locations, and maximize your followers.
  • Character Interaction 🌹 – Form relationships, build trust, and manage the personal dynamics of your crew

data.short_description: Ultimate adult industry simulation awaits! Welcome to Sex Industry XXX - experience a distinctive mix of a visual novel, interactive adult scenery, clicker gameplay and mini-games with various mechanics as a cherry on top!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon, Intel
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
